speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all rush in on the outskirts here to watch. I'll put you in over here to keep an eye on the sidelines. Grog, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --and asked you to "show him what you had learned." After slamming his feet into the sand and preparing himself for conflict, he beckons you towards him. And that is where we left off. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, oh god, oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --as you're standing up there on the edge of this pit, Groon just stands there with his hand beckoning towards you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I reach into my Bag of Holding, and I pull out a small drawing of the letter "G". This. This is what I have learn-- That's not it. That's not what I wanted. And I take out the Dwarven Thrower and I jump into the sandpit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. (jumping sound) (impact thud) There, as you land in the sand, the bottoms of your boots sinking but a couple of inches into the soft surface. Pike gets ready to leap down after and Groon puts his hand up. "No...."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're here, we're watching it, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys didn't say if you were catching up with them last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we said we came in the temple with them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Uh, no, we're totally watching this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So then you guys rush in afterward, hoping that-- Morpheus is fighting Neo, you guys-- (all laugh)
